chunks.text: The VectorStore class manages ChromaDB lifecycle and provides persistence across process restarts. It uses a PersistentClient that writes to the .assemblyzero/vector_store/ directory.
The EmbeddingProvider generates local embeddings using SentenceTransformers with the all-MiniLM-L6-v2 model. No network calls are made.
Collections provide isolated namespaces for different document types. The documentation collection stores parsed markdown files. The codebase collection stores source code chunks.
The QueryEngine provides a unified interface for adding, querying, and deleting documents across any collection. It automatically generates embeddings for incoming documents.
Text chunking splits large documents into overlapping windows of configurable size. The default chunk size is 512 tokens with a 50-token overlap for context continuity.
